entity.description: A mighty man of war, a Benjamite (2 Chr. 17:17).

nodes.label: Eliada
nodes.description: A mighty man of war, a Benjamite (2 Chr. 17:17).

verses.text: And of Benjamin; Eliada a mighty man of valour, and with him armed men with bow and shield two hundred thousand.
